# programs.yt-dlp

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.yt-dlp`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.yt-dlp.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable yt-dlp. |
| `programs.yt-dlp.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration to add to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yt-dlp/config`. |
| `programs.yt-dlp.package` | `package` | The yt-dlp package to use. |
| `programs.yt-dlp.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string or list of (boolean or signed integer or string))` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/yt-dlp/config`. Options must be specified in their "long form", for example, `update = true;` instead of `U = true;`. Short options can be specified in the `extraConfig` option. See <https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp#configuration> for explanation about possible values. |
